title: Z Skigen
text:
I am a statistician, baseball analyst, and data scientist with a passion for turning complex problems into actionable insight. My research applies Bayesian causal inference to questions of transportability — asking when and how findings from one population can inform another. My baseball work spans player evaluation, ABS challenge modeling, and building data infrastructure for front offices and college programs alike.
Learn more about me →
